name: S Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. With electric mixer, beat Crisco and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs one at a time and continue to beat until fluffy.
3. Add vanilla and beat well.
4. Add flour and baking powder. Mix well.
5. Turn dough onto floured board.
6. Roll dough into "S" shapes.
7. Brush tops with egg yolk.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 15 minutes. You can glaze these with confectioners sugar and water, but we never do - they're good plain.
